Notice Of Motion For Order Imposing Sanctions For Failure To Obey Prior Court Orders
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Roger T. Ritter, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Thelen Reid Brown Raysman & Steniner LLP

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Thelen Reid Brown Raysman & Steiner LLP's motion for order imposing sanctions for failure to obey prior court orders granted in part:
a. The court orders the issue sanctions numbered 1 through 8, inclusive, as set forth in plaintiff's notice of motion and motion for order imposing sanctions;
b. Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $1,500.00. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Notic Of Motion That Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted For Failure To Obey Court Order; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Roger T. Ritter, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Thelen Reid Brown Raysman & Steiner LLP

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Thelen, Reid, Brown, Raysman & Steiner LLP's motion that request for admissions be deemed admitted for failure to obey court order granted, as follows:
a. As to defendants Animal Partners Limited Partnership; Tag Entertainment, Inc.; Tag International Entertainment; Steve Austin Productions LLC, Requests for Admission Nos. 1 through 11, inclusive, and 14 through 23, inclusive are deemed admitted;
b. As to defendant Steve Austin, Requests for Admission Nos. 1 through 10, inclusive, and 13 through 84, inclusive are deemed admitted.
3. Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $1,500.00. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission Of Truth Of Acts & Genuineness Of Documents, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Apr-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Roger T. Ritter, Esq. of ADLER LAW FIRM 415/433-5333, appearing for plaintiff / moving party

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED as modified. (a) [Plaintiff's] Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admission, Set One; granted in part and denied in part, as follows:
i. As to defendant Animal Partners Limited Partnership, granted, except for Request for Admission nos. 12 & 13;
ii. As to defendant Steve Austin Productions LLC, granted, except for Request for Admission nos. 12 & 13;
iii. As to defendant TAG International Entertainment, granted, except for Request for Admission nos. 12 & 13;
iv. As to defendant Steve Austin, an individual, granted, except for Request for Admission nos. 11 & 12;
v. As to defendant TAG Entertainment, Inc., granted, except for request for admission No. 12 & 13.
(b) Request For Monetary Sanctions on [Plaintiff's] Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admission, Set One; granted; sanctions shall issue against defendants Animal Partners Limited Partnership, Steve Austin Productions LLC, TAG Entertainment, Inc., TAG International Entertainment, and Steve Austin (an individual), jointly and severally, in the sum of $500.00. Responses to be served, and sanctions paid within 20 days. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. Not reported.
